title: Golden Syrup Infused Mediterranean Gooey Bake
description: A sweet and savory, gooey, wood-fired-bake featuring the unique flavor of golden syrup, inspired by the Mediterranean diet.
instructions: Preheat your wood-fired oven or conventional oven to 425F (220C).
In a large bowl, whisk together the flour, baking powder, and salt.
In a separate bowl, whisk together the yogurt, honey, olive oil, lemon juice, and dried oregano.
Add the wet ingredients to the dry ingredients and stir until just combined.
Stir in the sesame seeds and chopped rosemary.
Pour in the golden syrup and mix until a sticky dough forms.
Turn the dough onto a lightly floured surface and knead for 5-7 minutes, until smooth and elastic.
Shape the dough into a round or oblong shape, about 1 1/2 inches thick.
Place the dough on a lightly floured comal or baking sheet and bake for 25-30 minutes, or until golden brown and puffed.
Remove from the oven and let cool for 5 minutes before transferring to a wire rack to cool completely.
Dust with confectioners' sugar before serving.
Slice into wedges and serve warm.
Serve with a dollop of whipped cream or a sprinkle of cinnamon, if desired.
